word: #   length   : letter count (must be 3-9 to be eligible)
#   dict     : dictionary backing claimed — VERIFY before pinning.
#   flags    : pipe-separated issues. clean=no known issue.
#              proper=proper-noun-ish; check=dict backing not yet confirmed
#   decision : pin | exclude | hold   (pin = force into final 7776)
#   notes    : rationale / variant forms / exclusion reason
#   - decision=pin words are FORCE-KEPT and protected from pruning (sec 5).
#   - Anything with a space/hyphen in its normal English form is excluded
#     here at source (we never store the space form). Listed below under
#     decision=hold below the v0.4 banner are dict-verified but recognizability-
#     deferred (promotable later). Earlier v1.0 target was ~120-180.
#   - "dict" claims are from OED/MW editorial articles + entries but MUST be
#     re-verified per-word before v1.0 (see SPEC sec 9 + Caveats).
